name: Southwestern Fajitas
recipeIngredient: 3 Bell peppers; cored and sliced (green, red, yellow)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a dry saucepan over medium heat, roast the peppercorns, annatto seeds, cumin seeds, chili powder, and oregano until the seeds begin to pop, about 5 minutes.
2. Place the roasted seeds in a blender with the salt and grind finely. Set aside.
3. Heat the olive oil in the pan over medium-high heat. Sauté the onions and peppers until soft, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the spice mix and cook for an additional 3-5 minutes, adding water if needed to keep the vegetables from sticking.
5. Cover the stacked tortillas with paper towels and heat in the microwave on high for 30 seconds. Place each tortilla on a plate.
6. Layer with cheese, vegetable mixture, lettuce, and tomato.
